    "Significant void space exists behind the trench shield/box",

    "Stop work immediately and evacuate workers from the trench",
    "Backfill and compact the voids behind the trench shield to prevent lateral movement",
    "Have a Competent Person inspect the trench and protective system before workers re-enter"

  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires that protective systems be installed and used in a manner that minimizes the hazard of cave-ins. Large voids behind a trench box allow the soil to move or collapse against the shield, which can cause sudden, catastrophic loading or structural failure of the protective system.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart P Appendix B",
    "OSHA 1926.652(g)"
  ]
